capabilities.title: 聊天 / 识图
capabilities.summary: 日常聊天、看图吐槽、读回复里的图片和上下文。

capabilities.title: 生图 / 改图
capabilities.summary: 生成图片、参考图改图、指定角色时查参考并尽量贴近原设。
examples: 回复图片说按这个姿势重画

capabilities.title: 文件 / 媒体
capabilities.summary: 读常见文本、代码、PDF、网页、小视频、GIF、音频转写、音频摘要和关键帧。
examples: 回复视频问发生了什么

capabilities.title: 搜索 / 网页
capabilities.summary: 搜索资料、搜图、网页截图、公开视频/YouTube 元数据、字幕和受限下载、下载外链图片并保存到本地图库，也能查 Pixiv 榜单和作品资源。

capabilities.title: 记忆 / 资料库
capabilities.summary: 维护群友印象、长期资料、角色/风格参考和轻量偏好。

capabilities.title: 群玩具
capabilities.summary: 抽老婆、签到、每日实验、群友自动冒险、图库统计、Telegram贴纸包管理和一些脚本式小玩法。

commands.notes: Deterministic runtime command handled before normal model context construction.

commands.description: Show available capabilities and control commands
commands.notes: Shows a capability overview plus script/control commands. Ordinary model abilities are intent-driven, not slash-command-driven.
Read-only but verbose. Summarize without exposing secrets.
Runtime-handled before normal model context construction. The Telegram UI first selects a model, then shows that model's raw thinking levels, with a Back button.
Runtime-handled before normal model context construction. Opens a fresh imagebot window with the selected persona and remembers the sender's default persona for later new windows.
Registered scripts only. Risky scripts require plan and explicit approval code.
memory => export_memory_backup. github => backup_to_github creates a local commit by default; network push is manual and outside normal chat flow.
Local write script for generated/downloaded media cache.
